abilities.name: Distended With Blood
abilities.text: This model receives +1 Sz for each friendly non-Summon, non-Slow token on it, to a maximum of +2.

abilities.name: Latch On
abilities.text: Enemy models in base contact with this model suffer -1 Df.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

triggers.name: Paralyzed
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Stunned token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Stunned token.

actions.name: Body Slam
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. If the target is at a lower elevation, this action receives a (+).
actions.effects: X is equal to this model's Sz. Place this model in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Where There's One
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy only. If the target is at half its maximum health or below, this action receives +1 to its Skl.
actions.effects: Summon a Giant Leech in base contact with the target.
